'''''Protector''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], it brought [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. It was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Aril Nunb]] and was equipped with the shuttle ''[[Chandrila Moon]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
In [[2008]], ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' stated there were three different [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyers]] called ''Protector'' in the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]]. This one was used by the new Republic and the two others by the Empire.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
